headline.supportingParagraph: Athaya Designed crafts distinctive logos, mascot identities, and visual systems for teams, schools, communities, and brands that need to look established, recognizable, and built to last.

featuredCaseStudy.title: The Nations Best
featuredCaseStudy.paragraph: A complete rebrand for TNB, reshaping the clan from its previous Bengal Tiger mark into a royal lion identity built for presence across court graphics, apparel, and community touchpoints.

chapters.title: Overview
chapters.label: Featured Case Study
chapters.heading: The Nations Best
chapters.paragraph: The project started from TNB's previous logo, a Bengal Tiger identity that already had recognition in the NBA2K community but needed a stronger, more ownable direction for the next era of the clan.

chapters.title: Challenge
chapters.label: Featured Case Study
chapters.heading: The Nations Best
chapters.paragraph: The challenge was to move beyond the old mascot without losing the competitive attitude of the brand. Early sketches explored a more royal, dominant animal direction that could better match the name The Nations Best.

chapters.title: Solution
chapters.label: Featured Case Study
chapters.heading: The Nations Best
chapters.paragraph: The final main logo turns TNB into a lion-led identity with a crown and castle-inspired structure, giving the clan a mark that feels fierce, royal, and built around the idea of a nation.

chapters.title: The System
chapters.label: Featured Case Study
chapters.heading: The Nations Best
chapters.paragraph: The identity system extends the main mascot into a compact brandmark and a wordmark, giving TNB flexible assets for profile use, apparel, graphics, and branded moments beyond the full crest.

chapters.title: Applications
chapters.label: Featured Case Study
chapters.heading: The Nations Best
chapters.category: Application / Apparel With The New Logo
chapters.paragraph: The new logo was tested on apparel so the identity could feel strong outside a static logo presentation, keeping the mark readable and impactful in merch-focused layouts.

chapters.title: Results
chapters.label: Featured Case Study
chapters.heading: The Nations Best
chapters.paragraph: The finished branding gives TNB a larger presence in the basketball environment, with the new identity carrying across the court and reinforcing the clan's competitive, royal visual language.

testimonials.label: TESTIMONIALS
testimonials.headline: TRUSTED BY TEAMS, BRANDS, AND CREATORS
testimonials.supportingCopy: Words from clients, collaborators, and organizations I’ve worked with across identity, mascot, typography, and brand systems.

items.quote: Been working with Athaya since early 2019 and never been disappointed or let down. Always working to get you exactly what we are looking for, fast and reliable while being able to work to a tight schedule. Sends you updates during the design phase so you can make changes if required. Would highly recommend working with Athaya.
items.name: Ozone Group Branding

items.quote: Athaya has been nothing short of AMAZING! He is the most skilled and Professional person i've ever had the pleasure of doing business with. I admire his communication and just how he kept me in the loop with how the project was going as he worked on my logo. Athaya will ALWAYS have my love and support.. This man is a W!
items.name: Achillies Arcadian

approach.label: Process
approach.headline:
Character.
Craft. Presence.
approach.paragraph: Athaya Designed creates marks and identity systems with clear structure, polished craft, and enough character to feel recognizable across apparel, signage, social media, and long-term brand use.

footerCta.headline:
Let's Build An Identity
With Character.
footerCta.paragraph: Tell me about your team, school, community, or brand and let's create an identity that feels established, recognizable, and built to last.
